name: Alicia Acorn
description: Lady Alicia Acorn is a character that appears in the Sonic the Hedgehog comic series and its spin-offs published by Archie Comics. She is a mobian squirrel-chipmunk, the wife of Maximillian Acorn, mother of Sally and Elias, and former queen of the Kingdom of Acorn. She is a kind, humble and supportive mother to her daughter and son but no longer rules the Kingdom of Acorn. Alicia was constantly at her husband's side, often advising him and their children in the process of rule.
creator: LyDaHoodge
